subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Be thou neither sorrowful nor dismayed, for in every matter lieth hidden a wisdom which shall, in due time, be made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله محزون مباش مغموم مباش از برای هر امری حکمتی عاقبت حکمتش ظاهر و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
